examples: The Webby Awards were established in 1996.
The 14th annual Webby Awards are to be announced in April 2010.
The Webby Awards list of the 10 most most influential Internet moments of the decade.
The Webby awards are presented by the International Academy of Digital Arts and Sciences.
The Winners Gallery currently features the past 16 years of Webby Winners, Nominees and Honorees.
